svg.text: YAAH — the three layers
A swappable transport, a stable core, and the application that specializes it.
depends on ↓
SPECIALIZATION — an app · agent specifics
prompts · pipeline graph (pipeline.json) · domain validators · transforms.py · report templates
all domain — the only layer that knows words like "spec", "RED", "review lens"; the app is just one of many
fully replaceable ⇄
swap the whole app
CORE — Nodes, base classes & helpers + the harness
contract: Envelope · Node · Comms line: harness (retry · fan-out · branch · suspend/resume · baton)
worker library: agent, get, post, transform, shell, render, python, worktree, validators · ports + defaults
generic — contains no application words; this is the part you don't fork
the engine
stable
TRANSPORT — NATS · LocalBus · in-process
moves Envelopes between nodes; the core talks to it only through the Comms interface
distribution is a deployment choice, not a code change
swap by one
config line ⇄
Only the core is fixed — both ends swap without touching it. It depends on interfaces (Node, Comms), never on the app above or the transport below.
